title: New ClawHub skill: json-tools - A Swiss-army-knife CLI for JSON files — validate, format, qu
content:
A Swiss-army-knife CLI for JSON files — validate, format, query, diff, filter, stats, flatten, and merge. Zero dependencies (Python stdlib).

Free + MIT. Live on ClawHub: clawhub.ai/skills/skills/json-tools

Part of the Hermes autonomous product stack (31 agent-native tools, all CI-tested).
Sponsor if useful: GitHub Sponsors / Buy Me a Coffee.
